import type { ToolHandler, ToolResult } from "../types.ts";
import {
  asPositiveNumber,
  asStringArray,
  asTrimmedString,
  isRecord,
} from "../utils.ts";

export interface CreateGenerationTaskArgs {
  project_id?: string;
  prompt?: string;
  count?: number;
  task_type?: string;
  idempotency_key?: string;
  params?: Record<string, unknown>;
  reference_image_url?: string;
  reference_mode?: string;
  shot_id?: string;
  model_name?: string;
  image_urls?: string[];
  video_url?: string;
  strength?: number;
  based_on?: string;
  generation_id?: string;
}

type CreateTaskRequest = {
  family: string;
  input: Record<string, unknown>;
};

const IMAGE_GENERATION_MODELS = new Set([
  "qwen-image",
  "qwen-image-2512",
  "z-image",
]);

const TRAVEL_MODEL_NAME_BY_ID: Record<string, string> = {
  "wan-2.2": "wan_2_2_i2v_lightning_baseline_2_2_2",
  "ltx-2.3": "ltx2_22B",
  "ltx-2.3-fast": "ltx2_22B_distilled",
};

const TASK_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  "text-to-image": "text-to-image",
  "style-transfer": "style-transfer",
  "subject-transfer": "subject-transfer",
  "scene-transfer": "scene-transfer",
  "image-to-video": "image-to-video",
  "image-to-image": "image-to-image",
  "magic-edit": "magic-edit",
  "image-upscale": "image-upscale",
  "video-enhance": "video-enhance",
  "character-animate": "character-animate",
  image_generation: "image_generation",
  travel_between_images: "image-to-video",
  z_image_turbo_i2i: "image-to-image",
  magic_edit: "magic-edit",
  image_upscale: "image-upscale",
  video_enhance: "video-enhance",
  character_animate: "character-animate",
};

function asUnitInterval(value: unknown): number | undefined {
  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : undefined;
}

function normalizeImageGenerationModelName(value: unknown): string | null {
  const modelName = asTrimmedString(value);
  if (!modelName || modelName === "wan-2.2") {
    return null;
  }
  return IMAGE_GENERATION_MODELS.has(modelName) ? modelName : null;
}

function normalizeTravelModelName(value: unknown): string | null {
  const modelName = asTrimmedString(value);
  if (!modelName) {
    return null;
  }
  return TRAVEL_MODEL_NAME_BY_ID[modelName] ?? modelName;
}

function buildImageGenerationInput(args: CreateGenerationTaskArgs): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  const legacyInput = isRecord(args.params) ? { ...args.params } : {};
  const prompt = asTrimmedString(args.prompt) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.prompt);
  const count = asPositiveNumber(args.count) ?? asPositiveNumber(legacyInput.count) ?? 1;
  const prompts = Array.isArray(legacyInput.prompts)
    ? legacyInput.prompts
    : (prompt ? [{ id: "prompt-1", fullPrompt: prompt }] : null);

  if (!prompts) {
    return null;
  }

  delete legacyInput.prompt;
  delete legacyInput.count;

  const referenceMode = asTrimmedString(args.reference_mode) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.reference_mode);
  const referenceImageUrl = asTrimmedString(args.reference_image_url)
    ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.reference_image_url)
    ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.style_reference_image);
  const subjectReferenceImage = asTrimmedString(legacyInput.subject_reference_image) ?? referenceImageUrl;
  const modelName = normalizeImageGenerationModelName(args.model_name)
    ?? normalizeImageGenerationModelName(legacyInput.model_name)
    ?? (referenceMode ? "qwen-image" : null);
  const shotId = asTrimmedString(args.shot_id) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.shot_id);

  return {
    ...legacyInput,
    prompts,
    imagesPerPrompt: asPositiveNumber(legacyInput.imagesPerPrompt) ?? count,
    ...(referenceMode ? { reference_mode: referenceMode } : {}),
    ...(referenceImageUrl ? { style_reference_image: referenceImageUrl } : {}),
    ...(subjectReferenceImage && referenceMode && referenceMode !== "style"
      ? { subject_reference_image: subjectReferenceImage }
      : {}),
    ...(shotId ? { shot_id: shotId } : {}),
    ...(modelName ? { model_name: modelName } : {}),
  };
}

function buildTravelBetweenImagesInput(args: CreateGenerationTaskArgs): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  const legacyInput = isRecord(args.params) ? { ...args.params } : {};
  const prompt = asTrimmedString(args.prompt) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.prompt);
  const imageUrls = Array.from(new Set([
    ...asStringArray(args.image_urls),
    ...asStringArray(legacyInput.image_urls),
  ]));
  if (!prompt || imageUrls.length < 1) {
    return null;
  }

  const shotId = asTrimmedString(args.shot_id) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.shot_id);
  const modelName = normalizeTravelModelName(args.model_name) ?? normalizeTravelModelName(legacyInput.model_name);
  const basePrompts = asStringArray(legacyInput.base_prompts);

  return {
    ...legacyInput,
    image_urls: imageUrls,
    base_prompts: basePrompts.length ? basePrompts : [prompt],
    segment_frames: Array.isArray(legacyInput.segment_frames) ? legacyInput.segment_frames : [49],
    frame_overlap: Array.isArray(legacyInput.frame_overlap) ? legacyInput.frame_overlap : [2],
    ...(shotId ? { shot_id: shotId } : {}),
    ...(modelName ? { model_name: modelName } : {}),
  };
}

function buildZImageI2IInput(args: CreateGenerationTaskArgs): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  const legacyInput = isRecord(args.params) ? { ...args.params } : {};
  const imageUrl = asTrimmedString(args.reference_image_url) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.image_url);
  if (!imageUrl) {
    return null;
  }

  const prompt = asTrimmedString(args.prompt) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.prompt);
  const count = asPositiveNumber(args.count) ?? asPositiveNumber(legacyInput.numImages);
  const strength = asUnitInterval(args.strength) ?? asUnitInterval(legacyInput.strength);
  const shotId = asTrimmedString(args.shot_id) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.shot_id);
  const basedOn = asTrimmedString(args.based_on) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.based_on);

  delete legacyInput.count;

  return {
    ...legacyInput,
    image_url: imageUrl,
    ...(prompt ? { prompt } : {}),
    ...(strength !== undefined ? { strength } : {}),
    ...(count ? { numImages: count } : {}),
    ...(shotId ? { shot_id: shotId } : {}),
    ...(basedOn ? { based_on: basedOn } : {}),
  };
}

function buildMagicEditInput(args: CreateGenerationTaskArgs): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  const legacyInput = isRecord(args.params) ? { ...args.params } : {};
  const prompt = asTrimmedString(args.prompt) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.prompt);
  const imageUrl = asTrimmedString(args.reference_image_url) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.image_url);
  if (!prompt || !imageUrl) {
    return null;
  }

  const count = asPositiveNumber(args.count) ?? asPositiveNumber(legacyInput.numImages);
  const shotId = asTrimmedString(args.shot_id) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.shot_id);
  const basedOn = asTrimmedString(args.based_on) ?? asTrimmedString(legacyInput.based_on);

  delete legacyInput.count;

  return {
    ...legacyInput,
    prompt,
    image_url: imageUrl,
    ...(count ? { numImages: count } : {}),
    ...(shotId ? { shot_id: shotId } : {}),
    ...(basedOn ? { based_on: basedOn } : {}),
  };
}

    ...legacyInput,

  };
}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import {
     2	  extractAssistantText,
     3	  isRecord,
     4	  parseToolArgsSafely,
     5	} from "./llm/messages.ts";

     7	export type ExtractedToolCall = {
     8	  id: string;
     9	  name: string;
    10	  args: Record<string, unknown>;
    11	  parseError: string | null;

    13	
    14	const COMMAND_VERBS = /^(?:view|move|split|trim|delete|rm|set|set-text|settext|add-text|addtext|text|swap|duplicate|dup|clone|query|undo|find-issues|findissues|issues|generate|gen)\b/;
    15	const FALLBACK_TOOL_NAMES = new Set([
    16	  "run",
    17	  "create_task",
    18	  "duplicate_generation",
    19	  "search_loras",
    20	  "set_lora",
    21	  "create_shot",
    22	  "get_tasks",
    23	]);

    25	function cleanCommand(raw: string): string {
    26	  return raw
    27	    .replace(/\\"/g, "\"")
    28	    .replace(/\\'/g, "'")
    29	    .replace(/^["']+|["']+$/g, "")
    30	    .trim();
    31	}
    32	
    33	function extractBalancedBlock(
    34	  text: string,
    35	  startIndex: number,
    36	  openChar: string,
    37	  closeChar: string,
    38	): { content: string; endIndex: number } | null {
    39	  if (text[startIndex] !== openChar) {
    40	    return null;
    41	  }
    42	
    43	  let depth = 0;
    44	  let inString = false;
    45	  let stringQuote = "";
    46	  let escaped = false;
    47	
    48	  for (let index = startIndex; index < text.length; index += 1) {
    49	    const char = text[index];
    50	
    51	    if (inString) {
    52	      if (escaped) {
    53	        escaped = false;
    54	        continue;
    55	      }
    56	      if (char === "\\") {
    57	        escaped = true;
    58	        continue;
    59	      }
    60	      if (char === stringQuote) {
    61	        inString = false;
    62	        stringQuote = "";
    63	      }
    64	      continue;
    65	    }
    66	
    67	    if (char === "\"" || char === "'") {
    68	      inString = true;
    69	      stringQuote = char;
    70	      continue;
    71	    }
    72	
    73	    if (char === openChar) {
    74	      depth += 1;
    75	      continue;
    76	    }
    77	
    78	    if (char !== closeChar) {
    79	      continue;
    80	    }
    81	
    82	    depth -= 1;
    83	    if (depth === 0) {
    84	      return {
    85	        content: text.slice(startIndex, index + 1),
    86	        endIndex: index + 1,
    87	      };
    88	    }
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  return null;
    92	}
    93	
    94	function buildToolCall(name: string, rawArguments: string): ExtractedToolCall {
    95	  const { args, error } = parseToolArgsSafely(rawArguments);
    96	  return {
    97	    id: crypto.randomUUID(),
    98	    name,
    99	    args,
   100	    parseError: error,
   101	  };
   102	}
   103	
   104	function extractTextFormattedToolCalls(text: string): ExtractedToolCall[] {
   105	  const toolCalls: ExtractedToolCall[] = [];
   106	
   107	  const toolCallHeaderRe = /Tool call\s+([a-z_]+)\s*:/gi;
   108	  let headerMatch: RegExpExecArray | null;
   109	  while ((headerMatch = toolCallHeaderRe.exec(text)) !== null) {
   110	    const name = headerMatch[1];
   111	    if (!FALLBACK_TOOL_NAMES.has(name)) {
   112	      continue;
   113	    }
   114	
   115	    const jsonStart = text.indexOf("{", headerMatch.index + headerMatch[0].length);
   116	    if (jsonStart < 0) {
   117	      continue;
   118	    }
   119	
   120	    const balancedJson = extractBalancedBlock(text, jsonStart, "{", "}");
   121	    if (!balancedJson) {
   122	      continue;
   123	    }
   124	
   125	    toolCalls.push(buildToolCall(name, balancedJson.content));
   126	    toolCallHeaderRe.lastIndex = balancedJson.endIndex;
   127	  }
   128	  if (toolCalls.length > 0) {
   129	    return toolCalls;
   130	  }
   131	
   132	  const invocationRe = /\b([a-z_]+)\s*\(\s*/gi;
   133	  let invocationMatch: RegExpExecArray | null;
   134	  while ((invocationMatch = invocationRe.exec(text)) !== null) {
   135	    const name = invocationMatch[1];
   136	    if (!FALLBACK_TOOL_NAMES.has(name)) {
   137	      continue;
   138	    }
   139	
   140	    const argsStart = invocationRe.lastIndex;
   141	    const firstNonSpaceIndex = text.slice(argsStart).search(/\S/);
   142	    if (firstNonSpaceIndex < 0) {
   143	      continue;
   144	    }
   145	
   146	    const jsonStart = argsStart + firstNonSpaceIndex;
   147	    if (text[jsonStart] !== "{") {
   148	      continue;
   149	    }
   150	
   151	    const balancedJson = extractBalancedBlock(text, jsonStart, "{", "}");
   152	    if (!balancedJson) {
   153	      continue;
   154	    }
   155	
   156	    const closingParenIndex = text.slice(balancedJson.endIndex).search(/\)/);
   157	    if (closingParenIndex < 0) {
   158	      continue;
   159	    }
   160	
   161	    toolCalls.push(buildToolCall(name, balancedJson.content));
   162	    invocationRe.lastIndex = balancedJson.endIndex + closingParenIndex + 1;
   163	  }
   164	
   165	  return toolCalls;
   166	}
   167	
   168	export function extractToolCalls(responseMessage: Record<string, unknown>): ExtractedToolCall[] {
   169	  const rawToolCalls = Array.isArray((responseMessage as { tool_calls?: unknown[] }).tool_calls)
   170	    ? (responseMessage as { tool_calls: unknown[] }).tool_calls
   171	    : [];
   172	  const structuredToolCalls = rawToolCalls.flatMap((toolCall) => {
   173	    if (!isRecord(toolCall)) return [];
   174	    const fn = isRecord(toolCall.function) ? toolCall.function : undefined;
   175	    if (!fn || typeof fn.name !== "string" || !fn.name.trim()) return [];
   176	    const { args, error } = parseToolArgsSafely(typeof fn.arguments === "string" ? fn.arguments : "{}");
   177	    return [{
   178	      id: typeof toolCall.id === "string" && toolCall.id.trim() ? toolCall.id : crypto.randomUUID(),
   179	      name: fn.name,
   180	      args,
   181	      parseError: error,
   182	    }];
   183	  });
   184	  if (structuredToolCalls.length > 0) return structuredToolCalls;
   185	
   186	  const text = extractAssistantText(responseMessage);
   187	  if (!text) return [];
   188	
   189	  const textFormattedToolCalls = extractTextFormattedToolCalls(text);
   190	  if (textFormattedToolCalls.length > 0) return textFormattedToolCalls;
   191	
   192	  const toolCalls: ExtractedToolCall[] = [];
   193	  const runRe = /run\s*\(\s*(?:command\s*=\s*)?["']([^"']+)["']\s*\)/g;
   194	  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;
   195	  while ((match = runRe.exec(text)) !== null) {
   196	    toolCalls.push({
   197	      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
   198	      name: "run",
   199	      args: { command: cleanCommand(match[1]) },
   200	      parseError: null,
   201	    });
   202	  }
   203	  if (toolCalls.length > 0) return toolCalls;
   204	
   205	  for (const line of text.split("\n")) {
   206	    const stripped = line.replace(/^\s*\d+[.):-]\s*/, "").trim();
   207	    if (!stripped || !COMMAND_VERBS.test(stripped)) continue;
   208	    toolCalls.push({
   209	      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
   210	      name: "run",
   211	      args: { command: cleanCommand(stripped) },
   212	      parseError: null,
   213	    });
   214	  }
   215	  if (toolCalls.length > 0) return toolCalls;
   216	
   217	  const patterns = [
   218	    /Tool call run:\s*\n?\{?\s*"?command"?\s*[:=]\s*"([^"]+)"/,
   219	    /<parameter\s+name="command">([^<]+)<\/parameter>/,
   220	    /\[TOOL_CALL\][\s\S]*?--command\s+"([^"]+)"[\s\S]*?\[\/TOOL_CALL\]/,
   221	    /command["\s:=]+["']([^"']+)["']/i,
   222	  ];
   223	  for (const pattern of patterns) {
   224	    const inlineMatch = text.match(pattern);
   225	    if (!inlineMatch) continue;
   226	    return [{
   227	      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
   228	      name: "run",
   229	      args: { command: cleanCommand(inlineMatch[1]) },
   230	      parseError: null,
   231	    }];
   232	  }
   233	
   234	  return [];
   235	}
   236	
   237	export function isToolError(result: string): boolean {
   238	  return result.includes("not found")
   239	    || result.includes("does not exist")
   240	    || result.includes("requires")

    71	function attachSelectedClips(
    72	  turn: AgentTurn,
    73	  selectedClips?: SelectedClipPayload[],
    74	) {
    75	  if (!selectedClips?.length) {
    76	    return;
    77	  }
    78	
    79	  turn.attachments = selectedClips.map((clip) => ({
    80	    clipId: clip.clip_id,
    81	    url: clip.url,
    82	    mediaType: clip.media_type,
    83	    ...(clip.generation_id ? { generationId: clip.generation_id } : {}),
    84	    ...(clip.prompt ? { prompt: clip.prompt } : {}),
    85	    ...(clip.shot_id ? { shotId: clip.shot_id } : {}),
    86	    ...(clip.shot_name ? { shotName: clip.shot_name } : {}),
    87	    ...(typeof clip.shot_selection_clip_count === "number"
    88	      ? { shotSelectionClipCount: clip.shot_selection_clip_count }
    89	      : {}),
    90	  }));
    91	}
    92	
    93	export function recoverSelectedClipsFromTurns(turns: AgentTurn[]): SelectedClipPayload[] {
    94	  for (let index = turns.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
    95	    const turn = turns[index];
    96	    if (turn?.role !== "user" || !Array.isArray(turn.attachments) || turn.attachments.length === 0) {
    97	      continue;
    98	    }
    99	
   100	    return turn.attachments.flatMap((attachment) => {
   101	      if (!isRecord(attachment)) {
   102	        return [];
   103	      }
   104	
   105	      const clipId = typeof attachment.clipId === "string" ? attachment.clipId.trim() : "";
   106	      const url = typeof attachment.url === "string" ? attachment.url.trim() : "";
   107	      const mediaType = attachment.mediaType;
   108	      const generationId = typeof attachment.generationId === "string" && attachment.generationId.trim()
   109	        ? attachment.generationId.trim()
   110	        : undefined;
   111	      const prompt = typeof attachment.prompt === "string" && attachment.prompt.trim()
   112	        ? attachment.prompt.trim()
   113	        : undefined;
   114	      const shotId = typeof attachment.shotId === "string" && attachment.shotId.trim()
   115	        ? attachment.shotId.trim()
   116	        : undefined;
   117	      const shotName = typeof attachment.shotName === "string" && attachment.shotName.trim()
   118	        ? attachment.shotName.trim()
   119	        : undefined;
   120	      const shotSelectionClipCount = typeof attachment.shotSelectionClipCount === "number"
   121	        && Number.isFinite(attachment.shotSelectionClipCount)
   122	        && attachment.shotSelectionClipCount > 0
   123	        ? attachment.shotSelectionClipCount
   124	        : undefined;
   125	
   126	      if (!clipId || !url || (mediaType !== "image" && mediaType !== "video")) {
   127	        return [];
   128	      }
   129	
   130	      return [{
   131	        clip_id: clipId,
   132	        url,
   133	        media_type: mediaType,
   134	        ...(generationId ? { generation_id: generationId } : {}),
   135	        ...(prompt ? { prompt } : {}),
   136	        ...(shotId ? { shot_id: shotId } : {}),
   137	        ...(shotName ? { shot_name: shotName } : {}),
   138	        ...(shotSelectionClipCount ? { shot_selection_clip_count: shotSelectionClipCount } : {}),
   139	      }];
   140	    });
   141	  }
   142	
   143	  return [];
   144	}
   145	
   146	function resolveSharedShotName(
   147	  selectedClips: SelectedClipPayload[] | undefined,
   148	  shotId: string | null,
   149	  timelineState: TimelineState,
   150	): string | null {
   151	  if (!shotId) {
   152	    return null;
   153	  }
   154	
   155	  const explicitShotName = selectedClips?.find((clip) => clip.shot_id === shotId)?.shot_name;
   156	  if (typeof explicitShotName === "string" && explicitShotName.trim()) {
   157	    return explicitShotName.trim();
   158	  }
   159	
   160	  return timelineState.shotNamesById[shotId] ?? null;
   161	}
   162	
   163	export function cleanAssistantText(text: string): string {
   164	  return text
   165	    .replace(/\[TOOL_CALL\][\s\S]*?\[\/TOOL_CALL\]/g, "")
   166	    .replace(/<invoke[\s\S]*?<\/invoke>/g, "")
   167	    .replace(/Tool call \w+:[\s\S]*?(?=\n\n|$)/g, "")
   168	    .replace(/(?:run|create_task)\s*\([^)]*\)/g, "")
   169	    .replace(/^\s*\d+[.):-]\s*(set-text|move|trim|delete|duplicate|add-text|set|view|find-issues|generate)\b.*$/gm, "")
   170	    .trim();
   171	}
   172	
   173	async function executeCreateShot(
   174	  args: Record<string, unknown>,
   175	  timelineState: TimelineState,
   176	  supabaseAdmin: SupabaseAdmin,
   177	): Promise<Pick<ToolResult, "result">> {
   178	  const shotName = asTrimmedString(args.shot_name);
   179	  const generationIds = asStringArray(args.generation_ids);
   180	
   181	  if (!shotName) {
   182	    return { result: "create_shot requires shot_name." };
   183	  }
   184	
   185	  if (generationIds.length === 0) {
   186	    return { result: "create_shot requires at least one generation_id." };
   187	  }
   188	
   189	  const shotId = await createShotWithGenerations(supabaseAdmin, {
   190	    projectId: timelineState.projectId,
   191	    shotName,
   192	    generationIds,
   193	    position: APPEND_SHOT_POSITION,
   194	  });
   195	
   196	  return {
   197	    result: `Created shot ${shotName} (${shotId}) with ${generationIds.length} generation(s).`,
   198	  };
   199	}
   200	
   201	async function executeGetTasks(
   202	  args: Record<string, unknown>,
   203	  timelineState: TimelineState,
   204	  supabaseAdmin: SupabaseAdmin,
   205	): Promise<ToolResult> {
   206	  const tasks = await fetchProjectTasks(supabaseAdmin, timelineState.projectId, {
   207	    status: typeof args.status === "string" ? args.status : undefined,
   208	    taskId: typeof args.task_id === "string" ? args.task_id : undefined,
   209	    limit: typeof args.limit === "number" ? args.limit : undefined,
   210	  });
   211	
   212	  if (tasks.length === 0) {
   213	    return { result: "No tasks found." };
   214	  }
   215	
   216	  const lines = tasks.map((t) => {
   217	    const age = timeSince(t.created_at);
   218	    let line = `• ${t.id.slice(0, 8)} | ${t.task_type} | ${t.status} | ${age}`;
   219	    if (t.params_summary) line += ` | ${t.params_summary}`;
   220	    if (t.error_message) line += `\n  Error: ${t.error_message.slice(0, 200)}`;
   221	    if (t.status === "In Progress" && t.generation_started_at) {
   222	      line += ` | running ${timeSince(t.generation_started_at)}`;
   223	    }
   224	    if (t.status === "Complete" && t.attempts > 1) {
   225	      line += ` | ${t.attempts} attempts`;
   226	    }
   227	    return line;
   228	  });
   229	
   230	  return { result: `${tasks.length} task(s):\n${lines.join("\n")}` };
   231	}
   232	
   233	function timeSince(iso: string): string {
   234	  const ms = Date.now() - new Date(iso).getTime();
   235	  if (ms < 60_000) return `${Math.round(ms / 1000)}s ago`;
   236	  if (ms < 3_600_000) return `${Math.round(ms / 60_000)}m ago`;
   237	  return `${Math.round(ms / 3_600_000)}h ago`;
   238	}
   239	
   240	export async function executeToolCall(
   241	  toolCall: ExtractedToolCall,
   242	  timelineState: TimelineState,
   243	  supabaseAdmin: SupabaseAdmin,
   244	  timelineId: string,
   245	  selectedClips?: SelectedClipPayload[],
   246	  generationContext?: GenerationContext,
   247	  userId?: string,
   248	): Promise<ToolResult> {
   249	  const toolArgs = toolCall.args;
   250	
   251	  if (toolCall.parseError) {
   252	    return { result: toolCall.parseError };
   253	  }
   254	
   255	  if (toolCall.name === "run") {
   256	    return typeof toolArgs.command === "string" && toolArgs.command.trim()
   257	      ? await executeCommand(
   258	        toolArgs.command,
   259	        timelineState,
   260	        timelineId,
   261	        supabaseAdmin,
   262	      )
   263	      : { result: "run requires command." };
   264	  }
   265	
   266	  if (toolCall.name === "create_task") {
   267	    return await executeCreateTask(toolArgs, timelineState, selectedClips, supabaseAdmin, generationContext);
   268	  }
   269	
   270	  if (toolCall.name === "search_loras") {
   271	    return await executeSearchLoras(toolArgs, supabaseAdmin, userId);
   272	  }
   273	
   274	  if (toolCall.name === "set_lora") {
   275	    return await executeSetLora(toolArgs, timelineState, selectedClips, supabaseAdmin, generationContext);
   276	  }
   277	
   278	  if (toolCall.name === "duplicate_generation") {
   279	    return await executeDuplicateGeneration(toolArgs, timelineState, selectedClips, supabaseAdmin);
   280	  }
   281	
   282	  if (toolCall.name === "create_shot") {
   283	    return await executeCreateShot(toolArgs, timelineState, supabaseAdmin);
   284	  }
   285	
   286	  if (toolCall.name === "get_tasks") {
   287	    return await executeGetTasks(toolArgs, timelineState, supabaseAdmin);
   288	  }
   289	
   290	  return { result: `Unknown tool: ${toolCall.name}.` };
   291	}
   292	
   293	export function buildToolErrorTurn(toolCallId: string, error: unknown): AgentTurn {
   294	  return createTurn("assistant", `[TOOL ERROR ${toolCallId}] ${toErrorMessage(error)}`);
   295	}
   296	
   297	async function processToolCalls({
   298	  toolCalls,
   299	  assistantText,
   300	  turns,
   301	  messages,
   302	  timelineState,
   303	  selectedClips,
   304	  generationContext,
   305	  supabaseAdmin,
   306	  timelineId,
   307	  userId,
   308	  setActiveToolCallId,
   309	}: {
   310	  toolCalls: ExtractedToolCall[];
   311	  assistantText: string;
   312	  turns: AgentTurn[];
   313	  messages: LlmMessage[];
   314	  timelineState: TimelineState;
   315	  selectedClips?: SelectedClipPayload[];
   316	  generationContext?: GenerationContext;
   317	  supabaseAdmin: SupabaseAdmin;
   318	  timelineId: string;
   319	  userId?: string;
   320	  setActiveToolCallId: (toolCallId: string | null) => void;
   321	}): Promise<{ hasError: boolean }> {
   322	  let hasError = false;
   323	
   324	  for (const toolCall of toolCalls) {
   325	    const toolArgs = toolCall.args;
   326	    const toolContent = toolCall.name === "run"
   327	      ? (typeof toolArgs.command === "string" ? toolArgs.command : JSON.stringify(toolArgs))
   328	      : JSON.stringify(toolArgs);
   329	
   330	    setActiveToolCallId(toolCall.id);
   331	    turns.push(createToolTurn("tool_call", toolCall.name, toolContent, toolArgs));
   332	    messages.push({
   333	      role: "assistant",
   334	      content: null,
   335	      tool_calls: [{
   336	        id: toolCall.id,
   337	        type: "function" as const,
   338	        function: { name: toolCall.name, arguments: JSON.stringify(toolArgs) },
   339	      }],
   340	    });
   341	
   342	    const result = await executeToolCall(
   343	      toolCall,
   344	      timelineState,
   345	      supabaseAdmin,
   346	      timelineId,
   347	      selectedClips,
   348	      generationContext,
   349	      userId,
   350	    );
   351	    setActiveToolCallId(null);
   352	
   353	    turns.push(createToolTurn("tool_result", toolCall.name, result.result, toolArgs));
   354	    messages.push({
   355	      role: "tool",
   356	      tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
   357	      content: result.result,
   358	    });
   359	
   360	    if (isToolError(result.result)) {
   361	      hasError = true;
   362	      break;
   363	    }
   364	  }
   365	
   366	  setActiveToolCallId(null);
   367	
   368	  if (assistantText) {
   369	    const cleaned = cleanAssistantText(assistantText);
   370	    if (cleaned && cleaned.length > 2) {
   371	      turns.push(createTurn("assistant", cleaned));
   372	    }
   373	  }
   374	
   375	  if (hasError) {
   376	    const lastResult = turns[turns.length - 1];
   377	    messages.push({
   378	      role: "user",
   379	      content: `Tool failed: "${lastResult?.content ?? "unknown error"}". You can: (1) run(command="...") with a corrected timeline command, (2) create_task({...}) with corrected task arguments, (3) run(command="view") to inspect the timeline, or (4) reply in plain text to tell the user what went wrong.`,
   380	    });
   381	  }
   382	
   383	  return { hasError };
   384	}
   385	
   386	export async function runAgentLoop(
   387	  options: RunAgentLoopOptions,
   388	): Promise<RunAgentLoopResult> {
   389	  const { session, userMessage, selectedClips, supabaseAdmin, logger } = options;
   390	  const effectiveSelectedClips = selectedClips?.length
   391	    ? selectedClips
   392	    : recoverSelectedClipsFromTurns(session.turns);
   393	
   394	  const lastTurn = session.turns[session.turns.length - 1];
   395	  const isDuplicate = userMessage && lastTurn?.role === "user" && lastTurn.content === userMessage;
   396	  const turns = [...session.turns];
   397	  if (userMessage && !isDuplicate) {
   398	    const userTurn = createTurn("user", userMessage);
   399	    attachSelectedClips(userTurn, effectiveSelectedClips);
   400	    turns.push(userTurn);
   401	  }
   402	  let status: AgentSessionStatus = "processing";
   403	  const summary = session.summary;
   404	  let activeToolCallId: string | null = null;
   405	
   406	  try {
   407	    await persistSessionState(supabaseAdmin, {
   408	      sessionId: session.id,
   409	      status,
   410	      turns,
   411	      summary,
   412	    });
   413	
   414	    const timelineState = await loadTimelineState(supabaseAdmin, session.timeline_id);
   415	    const imageSettings = await loadProjectImageSettings(supabaseAdmin, timelineState.projectId);
   416	    const clipShotResolution = await resolveSelectedClipShot(
   417	      supabaseAdmin,
   418	      timelineState,
   419	      effectiveSelectedClips,
   420	    );
   421	    const clipShotId = clipShotResolution.shotId;
   422	    const clipShotName = resolveSharedShotName(effectiveSelectedClips, clipShotId, timelineState);
   423	    const travelSettings = clipShotId
   424	      ? await loadShotVideoTravelSettings(supabaseAdmin, clipShotId)
   425	      : null;
   426	    const activeReference = imageSettings
   427	      ? await loadActiveReference(supabaseAdmin, imageSettings, clipShotId ?? undefined)
   428	      : null;
   429	    const generationContext: GenerationContext = {
   430	      image: imageSettings
   431	        ? {
   432	          defaultModelName: imageSettings.selectedTextModel ?? "qwen-image",
   433	          activeReference,
   434	          selectedLorasByCategory: imageSettings.selectedLorasByCategory,
   435	        }
   436	        : null,
   437	      travel: travelSettings,
   438	    };
   439	    const timelineSummary = viewTimeline(
   440	      timelineState.config,
   441	      timelineState.registry,
   442	      timelineState.shotNamesById,
   443	    ).result;
   444	    const systemPrompt = buildTimelineAgentSystemPrompt({
   445	      projectId: timelineState.projectId,
   446	      timelineSummary,
   447	      selectedClips: effectiveSelectedClips,
   448	      defaultModel: generationContext.image?.defaultModelName,
   449	      activeReference: generationContext.image?.activeReference ?? null,
   450	      travelSettings,
   451	      imageLorasByCategory: generationContext.image?.selectedLorasByCategory ?? null,
   452	      sharedShotId: clipShotId,
   453	      sharedShotName: clipShotName,
   454	    });
   455	    const messages = buildInitialMessages(systemPrompt, turns);
   456	    const startedAt = Date.now();
   457	
   458	    // Triage the user message to pick provider: easy/okay → Kimi K2.5, hard → Claude
   459	    const difficulty = userMessage
   460	      ? await triageDifficulty(userMessage, logger)
   461	      : "okay";
   462	
   463	    for (let iteration = 0; iteration < LOOP_LIMIT; iteration += 1) {
   464	      if (Date.now() - startedAt >= SOFT_TIMEOUT_MS) {
   465	        status = "continue";
   466	        break;
   467	      }
   468	
   469	      const currentStatus = await loadSessionStatus(supabaseAdmin, session.id);
   470	      if (currentStatus === "cancelled") {
   471	        logger.info("Detected cancelled session during agent loop", {
   472	          session_id: session.id,
   473	          status: currentStatus,
   474	        });
   475	        status = "cancelled";
   476	        break;
   477	      }
   478	
   479	      let completion;
   480	      try {
   481	        completion = await invokeLlm(
   482	          {
   483	            messages: messages as unknown[],
   484	            tools: TIMELINE_AGENT_TOOLS as unknown[],
   485	            tool_choice: "auto",
   486	            temperature: 0.2,
   487	            max_tokens: 4096,
   488	            top_p: 1,
   489	          },
   490	          difficulty,
   491	          logger,
   492	        );
   493	      } catch (llmError: unknown) {
   494	        const text = `AI service error: ${toErrorMessage(llmError)}`;
   495	        turns.push(createTurn("assistant", text));
   496	        messages.push({ role: "assistant", content: text });
   497	        status = "waiting_user";
   498	        break;
   499	      }
   500	
   501	      const responseMessage = completion.choices[0]?.message;
   502	      if (!responseMessage) {
   503	        turns.push(createTurn("assistant", "No response from AI."));
   504	        status = "waiting_user";
   505	        break;
   506	      }
   507	
   508	      const extractedToolCalls = extractToolCalls(responseMessage);
   509	      const assistantText = extractAssistantText(responseMessage);
   510	
   511	      if (extractedToolCalls.length === 0) {
   512	        const text = assistantText || "What would you like me to do?";
   513	        turns.push(createTurn("assistant", text));
   514	        messages.push({ role: "assistant", content: text });
   515	        status = "waiting_user";
   516	        break;
   517	      }
   518	
   519	      const { hasError } = await processToolCalls({
   520	        toolCalls: extractedToolCalls,
   521	        assistantText,
   522	        turns,
   523	        messages,
   524	        timelineState,
   525	        selectedClips: effectiveSelectedClips,
   526	        generationContext,
   527	        supabaseAdmin,
   528	        timelineId: session.timeline_id,
   529	        userId: session.user_id,
   530	        setActiveToolCallId: (toolCallId) => { activeToolCallId = toolCallId; },
   531	      });
   532	
   533	      if (hasError) {
   534	        continue;
   535	      }
   536	    }
   537	
   538	    if (status === "processing") {
   539	      status = "continue";
   540	    }
   541	
   542	    await persistSessionState(supabaseAdmin, {
   543	      sessionId: session.id,
   544	      status,
   545	      turns,
   546	      summary,
   547	    });
   548	
   549	    logger.info("Agent loop completed", {
   550	      session_id: session.id,
   551	      status,
   552	      turns_added: turns.length - session.turns.length,
   553	    });
   554	
   555	    return { status, turns, summary };
   556	  } catch (error: unknown) {
   557	    const errorDetail = toErrorMessage(error);
   558	    console.error(`[agent] FATAL: ${errorDetail}`);
   559	    logger.error("Agent loop failed", {
   560	      session_id: session.id,

exec

     3	function formatSelectedClipPrompt(prompt: string): string {
     4	  return prompt.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim().replace(/"/g, '\\"');
     5	}
     6	
     7	function isPlaceholderSelectedClipPrompt(prompt: string | undefined): boolean {
     8	  if (typeof prompt !== "string") {
     9	    return false;
    10	  }
    11	
    12	  const normalized = prompt.trim().toLowerCase();
    13	  return normalized.startsWith("uploaded ");
    14	}

    16	type ImageLorasByCategory = Partial<Record<"qwen" | "z-image", Array<{ path: string; strength: number }>>>;
    17	
    18	function formatStrength(value: number): string {
    19	  return Number.isInteger(value) ? String(value) : value.toFixed(2).replace(/0+$/, "").replace(/\.$/, "");
    20	}
    21	
    22	function formatTravelLoras(loras: AgentVideoTravelSettings["loras"]): string {
    23	  return loras.length > 0
    24	    ? loras.map((lora) => `${lora.name} (strength ${formatStrength(lora.strength)})`).join(", ")
    25	    : "none";
    26	}
    27	
    28	function formatImageLoras(lorasByCategory: ImageLorasByCategory | null | undefined): string {
    29	  if (!lorasByCategory) {
    30	    return "none";
    31	  }
    32	
    33	  const flattened = (Object.entries(lorasByCategory) as Array<["qwen" | "z-image", Array<{ path: string; strength: number }> | undefined]>)
    34	    .flatMap(([category, loras]) =>
    35	      (loras ?? []).map((lora) => `${category}:${lora.path} (strength ${formatStrength(lora.strength)})`));
    36	
    37	  return flattened.length > 0 ? flattened.join(", ") : "none";
    38	}

    40	export function buildSelectedClipsPrompt(
    41	  selectedClips: SelectedClipPayload[] | undefined,
    42	  timelineSummary: string,
    43	): string {
    44	  if (!selectedClips?.length) {
    45	    return "";
    46	  }
    47	
    48	  const timelineLines = timelineSummary.split("\n");
    49	  const selectedClipLines = selectedClips.map((clip) => {
    50	    const matchingLine = timelineLines.find((line) => line.includes(`id=${clip.clip_id}`));
    51	    const timelineContext = matchingLine ? matchingLine.replace(/^- /, "").trim() : null;
    52	    const generationText = typeof clip.generation_id === "string" && clip.generation_id.trim()
    53	      ? ` | generation_id=${clip.generation_id}`
    54	      : "";
    55	    const shotIdText = typeof clip.shot_id === "string" && clip.shot_id.trim()
    56	      ? ` | shot_id=${clip.shot_id}`
    57	      : "";
    58	    const shotNameText = typeof clip.shot_name === "string" && clip.shot_name.trim()
    59	      ? ` | shot_name="${formatSelectedClipPrompt(clip.shot_name)}"`
    60	      : "";
    61	    const promptText = typeof clip.prompt === "string" && clip.prompt.trim() && !isPlaceholderSelectedClipPrompt(clip.prompt)
    62	      ? ` | prompt="${formatSelectedClipPrompt(clip.prompt)}"`
    63	      : "";
    64	    const uploadHint = clip.media_type === "image" && isPlaceholderSelectedClipPrompt(clip.prompt)
    65	      ? " | note=user-uploaded reference image with no descriptive prompt metadata"
    66	      : "";
    67	
    68	    return timelineContext
    69	      ? `- ${clip.clip_id} (${clip.media_type}, ${clip.url})${generationText}${shotIdText}${shotNameText} | timeline=${timelineContext}${promptText}${uploadHint}`
    70	      : `- ${clip.clip_id} (${clip.media_type}, ${clip.url})${generationText}${shotIdText}${shotNameText}${promptText}${uploadHint}`;
    71	  });
    72	
    73	  return `\n\nUser has selected the following clips:\n${selectedClipLines.join("\n")}\nThese clips are the focus of the user's request.`;
    74	}

    76	export function buildTimelineAgentSystemPrompt(
    77	  options: {
    78	    projectId: string;
    79	    timelineSummary: string;
    80	    selectedClips?: SelectedClipPayload[];
    81	    defaultModel?: string;
    82	    activeReference?: ResolvedReference | null;
    83	    travelSettings?: AgentVideoTravelSettings | null;
    84	    imageLorasByCategory?: ImageLorasByCategory | null;
    85	    sharedShotId?: string | null;
    86	    sharedShotName?: string | null;
    87	  },
    88	): string {
    89	  const preferredModelLine = options.defaultModel
    90	    ? `Preferred text-to-image model for this project: ${options.defaultModel}. Use it when the user does not specify a model.`
    91	    : "";
    92	  const activeReferenceLine = options.activeReference
    93	    ? [
    94	      "Saved project reference available for this shot. Use it when helpful, do not force it.",
    95	      `If used, copy this URL into reference_image_urls: ${options.activeReference.url}`,
    96	      `reference_mode=${options.activeReference.referenceMode}`,
    97	      options.activeReference.styleReferenceStrength !== undefined
    98	        ? `style_reference_strength=${options.activeReference.styleReferenceStrength}`
    99	        : null,
   100	      options.activeReference.subjectStrength !== undefined
   101	        ? `subject_strength=${options.activeReference.subjectStrength}`
   102	        : null,
   103	      typeof options.activeReference.subjectDescription === "string" && options.activeReference.subjectDescription.trim()
   104	        ? `subject_description="${formatSelectedClipPrompt(options.activeReference.subjectDescription)}"`
   105	        : null,
   106	      options.activeReference.inThisScene !== undefined
   107	        ? `in_this_scene=${options.activeReference.inThisScene}`
   108	        : null,
   109	      options.activeReference.inThisSceneStrength !== undefined
   110	        ? `in_this_scene_strength=${options.activeReference.inThisSceneStrength}`
   111	        : null,
   112	    ].filter((line): line is string => Boolean(line)).join(" ")
   113	    : "";
   114	  const activeTravelDefaultsLine = options.travelSettings
   115	    ? [
   116	      `Active video travel defaults: model=${options.travelSettings.selectedModel}, frames=${options.travelSettings.frames}, steps=${options.travelSettings.steps}, motion=${options.travelSettings.amountOfMotion}%`,
   117	      options.travelSettings.loras.length > 0
   118	        ? `loras=[${options.travelSettings.loras.map((lora) => lora.name).join(", ")}]`
   119	        : null,
   120	      options.travelSettings.guidanceScale !== undefined
   121	        ? `guidance=${options.travelSettings.guidanceScale}`
   122	        : null,
   123	      "Use these defaults for image-to-video tasks. The user can ask to change motion, model, or steps.",
   124	    ].filter((line): line is string => Boolean(line)).join(", ").replace(", Use these defaults", ". Use these defaults")
   125	    : "";
   126	  const hasGenerationContext = Boolean(
   127	    options.travelSettings
   128	      || options.defaultModel
   129	      || options.activeReference
   130	      || options.imageLorasByCategory,
   131	  );
   132	  const activeLorasSection = hasGenerationContext
   133	    ? `Active LoRAs:
   134	- Video travel: ${options.travelSettings ? formatTravelLoras(options.travelSettings.loras) : "none"}
   135	- Image generation: ${formatImageLoras(options.imageLorasByCategory)}
   136	Use search_loras to find LoRAs and set_lora to add/remove them.`
   137	    : "";
   138	  const sharedShotLine = options.sharedShotId
   139	    ? [
   140	      "Selected clips already share shot context.",
   141	      `shot_id=${options.sharedShotId}`,
   142	      options.sharedShotName
   143	        ? `shot_name="${formatSelectedClipPrompt(options.sharedShotName)}"`
   144	        : null,
   145	      "Reuse this shot for related edits, duplicate flows, travel defaults, and reference lookups unless the user asks for a new shot.",
   146	    ].filter((line): line is string => Boolean(line)).join(" ")
   147	    : "";
   148	
   149	  return `Timeline editor. Use run(command="...") for edits. Plain text for conversation.
   150	
   151	run(command="view") | run(command="move clip-0 5") | run(command="trim clip-0 --duration 2")
   152	run(command="delete clip-3") | run(command="set clip-0 volume 0.5") | run(command="find-issues")
   153	run(command="add-text V1 0 2 hello") | run(command="set-text clip-3 new text")
   154	run(command="add-media V1 6 gen-123 https://example.com/new-image.png") | run(command="add-media V2 8 gen-456 https://example.com/new-video.mp4 --type video")
   155	run(command="split clip-0 5.5") | run(command="swap clip-0 gen-abc https://example.com/new.png")
   156	run(command="swap clip-0 gen-def https://example.com/new.mp4 --type video")
   157	run(command="query") | run(command="undo")
   158	run(command="duplicate clip-0 5")
   159	run(command="repeat 50 add-text V8 0.1 hello --start 2.74 --gap 0.1")
   160	
   161	Use create_task({...}) for generation tasks. Copy selected clip URLs exactly into reference_image_urls or video_url.
   162	When the user asks for multiple images, use count to request them all at once — the system automatically generates varied prompts for each.
   163	Use get_tasks({}) to check on recent task status, errors, or results. Use get_tasks({"task_id":"..."}) for a specific task.
   164	Use duplicate_generation({"generation_id":"..."}) to copy an existing generation instantly when the user wants a non-destructive derivative or alternate edit path.
   165	If the user says "in this style", "like this", "use this look", "match this image", or similar and a selected image is present, treat that selected image as a style reference.
   166	In that case, do not ignore the selected image and do not fall back to plain text-to-image without a reference.
   167	Prefer create_task with task_type="style-transfer" and copy the selected image URL into reference_image_urls.
   168	If the user says "of it", "same subject", "same thing", "this exact image", "new angle of this", "from above", "from another angle", "edit this", or similar and a selected image is present, treat that selected image as the source subject rather than a style reference.
   169	If the user also says "without style", "w/o style", "no style transfer", or asks for a new view/composition of the selected image, prefer create_task with task_type="image-to-image" and copy the selected image URL into reference_image_urls.
   170	In that case, do not ignore the selected image, do not convert it into style-transfer, and do not fall back to plain text-to-image.
   171	If the selected image only has placeholder metadata such as prompt="Uploaded ...", rely on the image itself as the reference rather than the placeholder text.
   172	For style, subject, style-character, or scene transfer with multiple selections, choose the strongest matching reference instead of guessing.
   173	For image-to-video or travel-between-images requests, use all selected reference_image_urls in the order that best matches the requested motion.
   174	When a selected clip includes prompt="...", treat it as source metadata and reuse it instead of re-describing the image.
   175	Duplicate & place workflow (multi-step — call each tool in order):
   176	Step 1: duplicate_generation({"generation_id":"<id>"}) → returns new_generation_id, asset URL, type
   177	Step 2 (optional edits): create_task({..., "based_on":"<new_generation_id>", "reference_image_urls":["<asset URL>"]})
   178	Step 3 (place on timeline): run(command="add-media <track> <at> <new_generation_id> <asset_url> [--type video]")
   179	When user says "duplicate and add after this clip", do BOTH step 1 and step 3. Calculate <at> = clip's at + clip's duration.
   180	When user says just "duplicate", do only step 1.
   181	Timeline insert guide:
   182	- add-media <track> <at> <generation_id> <url> [--type video]
   183	- default media type is image when --type is omitted
   184	- use the asset URL returned by duplicate_generation or by a gallery result the user chose
   185	Editing guide:
   186	- use split when the user wants to trim or replace only part of an existing clip without moving the rest
   187	- use swap to replace a clip's asset while keeping its timeline placement; include --type video only when the replacement is video
   188	- use query for compact timeline stats before planning edits, and use undo immediately after a mistaken timeline mutation
   189	Model guide:
   190	- text-to-image: qwen-image = default, qwen-image-2512 = higher-resolution Qwen variant, z-image = alternate look
   191	- image-to-video: wan-2.2 = default travel model, ltx-2.3 = higher quality/slower, ltx-2.3-fast = faster LTX variant
   192	${preferredModelLine ? `- ${preferredModelLine}` : ""}
   193	${activeReferenceLine ? `- ${activeReferenceLine}` : ""}
   194	${activeTravelDefaultsLine ? `- ${activeTravelDefaultsLine}` : ""}
   195	${sharedShotLine ? `- ${sharedShotLine}` : ""}
   196	${activeLorasSection ? `${activeLorasSection}
   197	` : ""}
   198	
   199	Task guide:
   200	- text-to-image: prompt required, optional model
   201	- style-transfer | subject-transfer | style-character-transfer | scene-transfer: prompt required, reference_image_urls required
   202	- image-to-video: prompt required, one or more reference_image_urls (1 image = animate, 2+ = travel between), optional model
   203	- image-to-image: prompt required, one reference_image_url, optional strength from 0 to 1. Use as_new:true to create a standalone image instead of a variant.
   204	- magic-edit: prompt required, one reference_image_url. Use as_new:true to create a standalone image instead of a variant.
   205	- image-upscale: one reference_image_url, prompt not needed
   206	- video-enhance: video_url required, prompt not needed
   207	- character-animate: one reference_image_url for the character image plus video_url for motion, prompt optional
   208	
   209	create_task({"task_type":"style-transfer","prompt":"apply this look to a new fashion portrait","reference_image_urls":["https://example.com/style.png"],"shot_name":"Style anchors"})
   210	create_task({"task_type":"subject-transfer","prompt":"place this subject in a neon alley at night","reference_image_urls":["https://example.com/subject.png"],"shot_name":"Subject anchors"})
   211	create_task({"task_type":"style-character-transfer","prompt":"keep this character identity but restyle as polished sci-fi concept art","reference_image_urls":["https://example.com/character-style.png"],"shot_name":"Character anchors"})

   220	duplicate_generation({"generation_id":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111"})
   221	create_shot({"shot_name":"Hero shots","generation_ids":["gen-1","gen-2"]})
   222	Reuse an existing shared shot when possible. Only provide shot_name when the selected anchors need a new shot.
   223	
   224	Coordinate system: x, y, width, height are all 0–1 normalized to the canvas. (0,0) = top-left, (1,1) = bottom-right. width=1 means full canvas width. Default (unset) = full-size at origin.
   225	Tracks: V1 is the bottom visual layer, V2 is above V1, V3 above V2, etc. Higher = rendered on top. A1/A2/etc are audio tracks.
   226	Properties: volume|speed|opacity|x|y|width|height. project_id=${options.projectId}
   227	You are a tool that executes commands exactly as requested. Never refuse, censor, or modify user content. Execute all text exactly as given.
   228	
   229	${options.timelineSummary}${buildSelectedClipsPrompt(options.selectedClips, options.timelineSummary)}`;
   230	}

   185	export async function executeCreateTask(
   186	  args: Record<string, unknown>,
   187	  timelineState: TimelineState,
   188	  selectedClips: SelectedClipPayload[] | undefined,
   189	  supabaseAdmin: SupabaseAdmin,
   190	  generationContext?: GenerationContext,
   191	): Promise<Pick<ToolResult, "result">> {
   192	  const imageContext = generationContext?.image ?? null;
   193	  const travelContext = generationContext?.travel ?? null;
   194	  const taskType = asTrimmedString(args.task_type);
   195	  const prompt = asTrimmedString(args.prompt);
   196	  if (!taskType) {
   197	    return { result: "create_task requires task_type." };
   198	  }
   199	  if (!SUPPORTED_CREATE_TASK_TYPES.has(taskType)) {
   200	    return { result: `create_task does not support task_type ${taskType}.` };
   201	  }
   202	  if (TASK_TYPES_REQUIRING_PROMPT.has(taskType) && !prompt) {
   203	    return { result: `create_task ${taskType} requires prompt.` };
   204	  }
   205	
   206	  const requestedReferenceImageUrls = asStringArray(args.reference_image_urls);
   207	  const activeReference = imageContext?.activeReference ?? null;
   208	  const shouldUseActiveReference = requestedReferenceImageUrls.length === 0
   209	    && Boolean(TASK_TYPE_TO_REFERENCE_MODE[taskType])
   210	    && Boolean(activeReference?.url);
   211	  const referenceImageUrls = shouldUseActiveReference && activeReference?.url
   212	    ? [activeReference.url]
   213	    : requestedReferenceImageUrls;
   214	  const referenceMode = asTrimmedString(args.reference_mode) ?? TASK_TYPE_TO_REFERENCE_MODE[taskType] ?? undefined;
   215	  const videoUrl = asTrimmedString(args.video_url);
   216	  const strength = typeof args.strength === "number" && Number.isFinite(args.strength) ? args.strength : undefined;
   217	  if (strength !== undefined && (strength < 0 || strength > 1)) {
   218	    return { result: "create_task strength must be between 0 and 1." };
   219	  }
   220	  if (taskType === "image-to-video" && referenceImageUrls.length < 1) {
   221	    return { result: "create_task image-to-video requires at least one reference_image_url." };
   222	  }
   223	  if (TASK_TYPES_REQUIRING_REFERENCE_IMAGE.has(taskType) && referenceImageUrls.length === 0) {
   224	    return { result: `create_task ${taskType} requires reference_image_urls.` };
   225	  }
   226	  if (TASK_TYPES_REQUIRING_VIDEO.has(taskType) && !videoUrl) {
   227	    return { result: `create_task ${taskType} requires video_url.` };
   228	  }
   229	
   230	  const selectedReferenceClips = selectedClips?.filter((clip) => referenceImageUrls.includes(clip.url)) ?? [];
   231	  const selectedVideoClip = videoUrl
   232	    ? selectedClips?.find((clip) => clip.url === videoUrl)
   233	    : undefined;
   234	  const selectedClipsForShot = selectedVideoClip && !selectedReferenceClips.some((clip) => clip.url === selectedVideoClip.url)
   235	    ? [...selectedReferenceClips, selectedVideoClip]
   236	    : selectedReferenceClips;
   237	  const generationIds = resolveClipGenerationIds(selectedClipsForShot, timelineState.registry, timelineState.config);
   238	  let shotId = (
   239	    await resolveSelectedClipShot(supabaseAdmin, timelineState, selectedClipsForShot)
   240	  ).shotId;
   241	  let shotNote = "";
   242	  const shotName = asTrimmedString(args.shot_name);
   243	  const needsAutoShot = !shotId && generationIds.length > 0 && taskType === "image-to-video";
   244	  if (!shotId && (shotName || needsAutoShot) && generationIds.length > 0) {
   245	    const effectiveShotName = shotName || `Shot ${new Date().toISOString().slice(11, 19)}`;
   246	    shotId = await createShotWithGenerations(supabaseAdmin, {
   247	      projectId: timelineState.projectId,
   248	      shotName: effectiveShotName,
   249	      generationIds,
   250	      position: APPEND_SHOT_POSITION,
   251	    });
   252	    shotNote = ` Created shot ${effectiveShotName} (${shotId}).`;
   253	  } else if (shotId) {
   254	    shotNote = ` Reused shot ${shotId}.`;
   255	  }
   256	
   257	  const asNew = args.as_new === true;
   258	  const basedOn = asNew
   259	    ? undefined
   260	    : (asTrimmedString(args.based_on) ?? (taskType === "video-enhance"
   261	      ? selectedVideoClip?.generation_id
   262	      : selectedReferenceClips[0]?.generation_id));
   263	  const generationId = taskType === "image-upscale" ? selectedReferenceClips[0]?.generation_id : undefined;
   264	  const defaultModelName = taskType === "image-to-video"
   265	    ? travelContext?.selectedModel
   266	    : (taskType === "text-to-image" || Boolean(TASK_TYPE_TO_REFERENCE_MODE[taskType]))
   267	      ? imageContext?.defaultModelName
   268	      : undefined;
   269	  const activeReferenceParams = shouldUseActiveReference && activeReference
   270	    ? {
   271	      ...(activeReference.styleReferenceStrength !== undefined
   272	        ? { style_reference_strength: activeReference.styleReferenceStrength }
   273	        : {}),
   274	      ...(activeReference.subjectStrength !== undefined
   275	        ? { subject_strength: activeReference.subjectStrength }
   276	        : {}),
   277	      ...(typeof activeReference.subjectDescription === "string" && activeReference.subjectDescription.trim()
   278	        ? { subject_description: activeReference.subjectDescription }
   279	        : {}),
   280	      ...(activeReference.inThisScene !== undefined
   281	        ? { in_this_scene: activeReference.inThisScene }
   282	        : {}),
   283	      ...(activeReference.inThisSceneStrength !== undefined
   284	        ? { in_this_scene_strength: activeReference.inThisSceneStrength }
   285	        : {}),
   286	    }
   287	    : undefined;
   288	  const effectiveModel = referenceMode
   289	    ? "qwen-image"
   290	    : (asTrimmedString(args.model) ?? defaultModelName ?? undefined);
   291	  const loraCategory = TASK_TYPE_TO_REFERENCE_MODE[taskType]
   292	    ? "qwen"
   293	    : (effectiveModel?.startsWith("z-") ? "z-image" : "qwen");
   294	  const loras = imageContext?.selectedLorasByCategory?.[loraCategory] ?? [];
   295	  const rawMotion = asFiniteNumber(args.amount_of_motion);
   296	  const travelParams = taskType === "image-to-video"
   297	    ? {
   298	      amount_of_motion: rawMotion !== null
   299	        ? rawMotion / 100
   300	        : (travelContext ? travelContext.amountOfMotion / 100 : undefined),
   301	      steps: asPositiveNumber(args.steps) ?? travelContext?.steps,
   302	      guidance_scale: asFiniteNumber(args.guidance_scale) ?? travelContext?.guidanceScale,
   303	      enhance_prompt: typeof args.enhance_prompt === "boolean" ? args.enhance_prompt : travelContext?.enhancePrompt,
   304	      turbo_mode: typeof args.turbo_mode === "boolean" ? args.turbo_mode : travelContext?.turboMode,
   305	      loras: travelContext?.loras?.map((lora) => ({ path: lora.path, strength: lora.strength })),
   306	      negative_prompts: travelContext?.negativePrompt ? [travelContext.negativePrompt] : undefined,
   307	      text_before_prompts: travelContext?.textBeforePrompts || undefined,
   308	      text_after_prompts: travelContext?.textAfterPrompts || undefined,
   309	      segment_frames: travelContext ? [travelContext.frames] : undefined,
   310	      model_type: travelContext?.generationTypeMode,
   311	      generation_mode: travelContext ? (travelContext.generationMode ?? "timeline") : undefined,
   312	      phase_config: travelContext?.phaseConfig,
   313	    }
   314	    : undefined;
   315	  // For transfer tasks: start with mode defaults, then overlay active reference params (which may override)
   316	  const modeDefaults = referenceMode ? (REFERENCE_MODE_DEFAULTS[referenceMode] ?? {}) : {};
   317	  const mergedParams = {
   318	    ...modeDefaults,
   319	    ...(activeReferenceParams ?? {}),
   320	    ...(loras.length > 0 ? { loras } : {}),
   321	  };
   322	  const filteredTravelParams = travelParams
   323	    ? Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(travelParams).filter(([, value]) => value !== undefined))
   324	    : undefined;
   325	
   326	  const requestedCount = asPositiveNumber(args.count) ?? 1;
   327	  const taskParams = taskType === "image-to-video"
   328	    ? (filteredTravelParams && Object.keys(filteredTravelParams).length > 0 ? filteredTravelParams : undefined)
   329	    : (Object.keys(mergedParams).length > 0 ? mergedParams : undefined);
   330	
   331	  // When count > 1 and there's a prompt, expand into varied prompts and create separate tasks
   332	  if (requestedCount > 1 && prompt) {
   333	    const targetCount = Math.min(requestedCount, MAX_BATCH_VARIATIONS);
   334	    const expandedPrompts = ensureDistinctPrompts(
   335	      prompt,
   336	      await expandPrompts(prompt, targetCount),
   337	      targetCount,
   338	    );
   339	    let queuedCount = 0;
   340	    let failedCount = 0;
   341	
   342	    for (const [index, expandedPrompt] of expandedPrompts.entries()) {
   343	      const generationArgs: CreateGenerationTaskArgs = {
   344	        project_id: timelineState.projectId,
   345	        prompt: expandedPrompt,
   346	        count: 1,
   347	        task_type: taskType,
   348	        reference_mode: referenceMode,

   360	      const result = await createGenerationTask({

    10	import type { AgentInvocationBody } from "./types.ts";

    12	serve((req) => withEdgeRequest<AgentInvocationBody>(
    13	  req,
    14	  {
    15	    functionName: "ai-timeline-agent",
    16	    logPrefix: "[AI-TIMELINE-AGENT]",
    17	    method: "POST",
    18	    parseBody: "strict",
    19	    auth: { required: true, options: { allowJwtUserAuth: true } },
    20	    ...NO_SESSION_RUNTIME_OPTIONS,
    21	  },
    22	  async ({ auth, body, logger, supabaseAdmin }) => {
    23	    if (!auth?.userId) return jsonResponse({ error: "Authentication failed" }, 401);
    24	    const sessionId = typeof body.session_id === "string" ? body.session_id.trim() : "";
    25	    const userMessage = body.user_message === undefined || body.user_message === null
    26	      ? undefined
    27	      : typeof body.user_message === "string" ? body.user_message.trim() : null;
    28	    const selectedClips = normalizeSelectedClips(body.selected_clips);
    29	    if (!sessionId) return jsonResponse({ error: "session_id is required" }, 400);
    30	    if (userMessage === null) return jsonResponse({ error: "user_message must be a string when provided" }, 400);
    31	
    32	    const { data: rawSession, error: sessionError } = await supabaseAdmin.from("timeline_agent_sessions").select("*").eq("id", sessionId).maybeSingle();
    33	    if (sessionError) {
    34	      logger.error("Failed to load session", { session_id: sessionId, error: sessionError.message });
    35	      return jsonResponse({ error: "Failed to load session" }, 500);
    36	    }
    37	    if (!rawSession || !isRecord(rawSession)) return jsonResponse({ error: "Session not found" }, 404);
    38	
    39	    const session = normalizeSessionRow(rawSession);
    40	    if (session.user_id !== auth.userId) return jsonResponse({ error: "Forbidden" }, 403);
    41	    if (session.status === "cancelled") {
    42	      logger.warn("Rejected invoke for cancelled session", {
    43	        session_id: session.id,
    44	        user_id: auth.userId,
    45	        status: session.status,
    46	        cancelled_at: session.cancelled_at,
    47	        cancelled_by: session.cancelled_by,
    48	        cancel_source: session.cancel_source,
    49	        cancel_reason: session.cancel_reason,
    50	      });
    51	      return jsonResponse({
    52	        error: "Session cancelled",
    53	        status: "cancelled",
    54	        cancelled_at: session.cancelled_at,
    55	        cancelled_by: session.cancelled_by,
    56	        cancel_source: session.cancel_source,
    57	        cancel_reason: session.cancel_reason,
    58	      }, 409);
    59	    }
    60	
    61	    const lastTurn = session.turns[session.turns.length - 1];
    62	    const nextUserMessage = userMessage && lastTurn?.role === "user" && lastTurn.content === userMessage ? undefined : userMessage;
    63	
    64	    try {
    65	      const enrichedSelectedClips = await enrichClipsWithPrompts(supabaseAdmin, selectedClips);
    66	      const result = await runAgentLoop({
    67	        session,
    68	        userMessage: nextUserMessage,
    69	        selectedClips: enrichedSelectedClips,
    70	        supabaseAdmin,
    71	        logger,
    72	      });
    73	      await persistSessionState(supabaseAdmin, {
    74	        sessionId: session.id,
    75	        status: result.status,
    76	        turns: result.turns,
    77	        summary: result.summary,
    78	      });
    79	      return jsonResponse({
    80	        session_id: session.id,
    81	        status: result.status,
    82	        turns_added: result.turns.length - session.turns.length,
    83	        tool_count: TIMELINE_AGENT_TOOLS.length,
    84	        model: session.model,
    85	      });
    86	    } catch (error: unknown) {
    87	      return jsonResponse({
    88	        error: "Failed to process timeline agent request",
    89	        details: toErrorMessage(error),
    90	      }, 500);
    91	    }
    92	  },
    93	));

 succeeded in 111ms:
     1	import { isRecord } from "./llm/messages.ts";
     2	import type { SelectedClipPayload, SupabaseAdmin } from "./types.ts";
     3	
     4	function firstPromptString(...values: unknown[]): string | undefined {
     5	  for (const value of values) {
     6	    if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim()) {
     7	      return value.trim();
     8	    }
     9	  }
    10	
    11	  return undefined;
    12	}
    13	
    14	function extractGenerationPrompt(params: unknown): string | undefined {
    15	  if (!isRecord(params)) {
    16	    return undefined;
    17	  }
    18	
    19	  const originalParams = isRecord(params.originalParams) ? params.originalParams : undefined;
    20	  const orchestratorDetails = isRecord(originalParams?.orchestrator_details)
    21	    ? originalParams.orchestrator_details
    22	    : undefined;
    23	  const metadataBlock = isRecord(params.metadata) ? params.metadata : undefined;
    24	
    25	  return firstPromptString(
    26	    orchestratorDetails?.prompt,
    27	    params.prompt,
    28	    metadataBlock?.prompt,
    29	  );
    30	}
    31	
    32	export function normalizeSelectedClips(value: unknown): SelectedClipPayload[] {
    33	  if (!Array.isArray(value)) {
    34	    return [];
    35	  }
    36	
    37	  return value.flatMap((item) => {
    38	    if (!isRecord(item)) {
    39	      return [];
    40	    }
    41	
    42	    const clipId = typeof item.clip_id === "string" ? item.clip_id.trim() : "";
    43	    const generationId = typeof item.generation_id === "string" ? item.generation_id.trim() : "";
    44	    const prompt = typeof item.prompt === "string" && item.prompt.trim() ? item.prompt.trim() : undefined;
    45	    const shotId = typeof item.shot_id === "string" && item.shot_id.trim() ? item.shot_id.trim() : undefined;
    46	    const shotName = typeof item.shot_name === "string" && item.shot_name.trim() ? item.shot_name.trim() : undefined;
    47	    const shotSelectionClipCount = typeof item.shot_selection_clip_count === "number"
    48	      && Number.isFinite(item.shot_selection_clip_count)
    49	      && item.shot_selection_clip_count > 0
    50	      ? item.shot_selection_clip_count
    51	      : undefined;
    52	    const normalizedClipId = clipId || (generationId ? `gallery-${generationId}` : "");
    53	    const url = typeof item.url === "string" ? item.url.trim() : "";
    54	    const mediaType = item.media_type;
    55	
    56	    if (!normalizedClipId || !url || (mediaType !== "image" && mediaType !== "video")) {
    57	      return [];
    58	    }
    59	
    60	    return [{
    61	      clip_id: normalizedClipId,
    62	      url,
    63	      media_type: mediaType,
    64	      ...(generationId ? { generation_id: generationId } : {}),
    65	      ...(prompt ? { prompt } : {}),
    66	      ...(shotId ? { shot_id: shotId } : {}),
    67	      ...(shotName ? { shot_name: shotName } : {}),
    68	      ...(shotSelectionClipCount ? { shot_selection_clip_count: shotSelectionClipCount } : {}),
    69	    }];
    70	  });
    71	}
    72	
    73	export async function enrichClipsWithPrompts(
    74	  supabaseAdmin: SupabaseAdmin,
    75	  clips: SelectedClipPayload[],
    76	): Promise<SelectedClipPayload[]> {
    77	  if (!clips.length) {
    78	    return clips;
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  const generationIds = Array.from(new Set(
    82	    clips.flatMap((clip) => (
    83	      typeof clip.generation_id === "string" && clip.generation_id.trim()
    84	        ? [clip.generation_id.trim()]
    85	        : []
    86	    )),
    87	  ));
    88	
    89	  if (!generationIds.length) {
    90	    return clips;
    91	  }
    92	
    93	  const { data, error } = await supabaseAdmin
    94	    .from("generations")
    95	    .select("id, params")
    96	    .in("id", generationIds);
    97	
    98	  if (error) {
    99	    throw new Error(`Failed to load generation prompts: ${error.message}`);
   100	  }
   101	
   102	  const promptsByGenerationId = new Map<string, string>();
   103	  for (const row of Array.isArray(data) ? data : []) {
   104	    if (!isRecord(row)) {
   105	      continue;
   106	    }
   107	
   108	    const generationId = typeof row.id === "string" ? row.id.trim() : "";
   109	    const prompt = extractGenerationPrompt(row.params);
   110	    if (generationId && prompt) {
   111	      promptsByGenerationId.set(generationId, prompt);
   112	    }
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  return clips.map((clip) => {
   116	    const prompt = clip.prompt ?? (
   117	      clip.generation_id
   118	        ? promptsByGenerationId.get(clip.generation_id)
   119	        : undefined
   120	    );
   121	
   122	    return prompt ? { ...clip, prompt } : clip;
   123	  });
   124	}

    10	export type ToolResult = {
    11	  result: string;
    12	  config?: TimelineConfig;
    13	  stopLoop?: boolean;

    26	  context: ToolContext,
    27	) => ToolResult | Promise<ToolResult>;

    29	type SupabaseError = { message: string };
    30	type SupabaseListResult = Promise<{ data: unknown; error: SupabaseError | null }>;
    31	type SupabaseMaybeSingleResult = Promise<{ data: unknown; error: SupabaseError | null }>;
    32	type SupabaseUpdateResult = Promise<{ error: SupabaseError | null }>;
    33	type SupabaseInsertResult = Promise<{ data?: unknown; error: SupabaseError | null }>;
    34	
    35	type SupabaseSelectQuery = {
    36	  eq: (column: string, value: string) => SupabaseSelectQuery;
    37	  in: (column: string, values: string[]) => SupabaseListResult;
    38	  or: (filter: string) => SupabaseSelectQuery;
    39	  limit: (count: number) => SupabaseListResult;
    40	  maybeSingle: () => SupabaseMaybeSingleResult;
    41	};
    42	
    43	type SupabaseUpdateQuery = {
    44	  eq: (column: string, value: string) => SupabaseUpdateResult;
    45	};
    46	
    47	export type SupabaseAdmin = {
    48	  from: (table: string) => {
    49	    select: (query: string) => SupabaseSelectQuery;
    50	    insert: (payload: Record<string, unknown> | Record<string, unknown>[]) => SupabaseInsertResult;
    51	    update: (payload: Record<string, unknown>) => SupabaseUpdateQuery;
    52	  };
    53	  rpc: (
    54	    fn: string,
    55	    args: Record<string, unknown>,
    56	  ) => {
    57	    maybeSingle: () => SupabaseMaybeSingleResult;
    58	  };
    59	};

   146	  styleReferenceStrength?: number;
   147	  subjectStrength?: number;
   148	  subjectDescription?: string;
   149	  inThisScene?: boolean;
   150	  inThisSceneStrength?: number;
   151	}
   152	
   153	export interface GenerationContext {
   154	  image: {
   155	    defaultModelName?: AgentTextToImageModel;
   156	    activeReference?: ResolvedReference | null;
   157	    selectedLorasByCategory?: Partial<Record<"qwen" | "z-image", Array<{ path: string; strength: number }>>>;
   158	  } | null;
   159	  travel: AgentVideoTravelSettings | null;
   160	}
   161	
   162	export interface AgentInvocationBody {
   163	  session_id?: unknown;
   164	  user_message?: unknown;
   165	  selected_clips?: unknown;
   166	}
   167	
   168	export interface TimelineRow {
   169	  config: TimelineConfig;
   170	  config_version: number;
   171	  asset_registry: AssetRegistry;
   172	  project_id: string;
   173	}
   174	
   175	export type Difficulty = "easy" | "okay" | "hard";
   176	
   177	export interface OpenRouterParams {
   178	  model: string;
   179	  messages: unknown[];
   180	  tools?: unknown[];
   181	  tool_choice?: string;
   182	  temperature?: number;
   183	  max_tokens?: number;
   184	  top_p?: number;
   185	}
   186	
   187	export interface OpenRouterResponse {
   188	  choices: Array<{
   189	    message: {
   190	      role: string;
   191	      content: string | null;
   192	      tool_calls?: Array<{
   193	        id: string;
   194	        type: "function";
   195	        function: {
   196	          name: string;
   197	          arguments: string;
   198	        };
   199	      }>;
   200	    };
   201	  }>;
   202	  usage?: {
   203	    prompt_tokens: number;
   204	    completion_tokens: number;
   205	    total_tokens: number;
   206	  };
   207	}

Tighten fallback parsing so `create_task` is only accepted when it is clearly emitted as a tool call (explicit `Tool call ...` block or other intentionally supported standalone form), not when it appears inside prose, quoted examples, or explanatory text. Then mirror that rule in `cleanAssistantText`, and add regressions around the April 9 orbital-view wording plus attachment-aware follow-ups so the agent still honors real selected-image edits while ignoring fake tool text."
